response.summary: I was wondering where the little baby dragon sleeps? Like does she have her own little nest or does she room with Ghost? I think...
response.question:
I was wondering where the little baby dragon sleeps? Like does she have her own little nest or does she room with Ghost? I think it would be kinda charming if Soap made her a really soft nest type thing, but she tried to sleep anywhere except there lol.

May I request a silly picture of the kitty 🥺
response.answer:
She stays with either ghost or soap, depending on if ghost is full dragon or not. Kinda thinking with ghost in the beginning, ghost will not shift to human form due to him being all need to be big to protect xD so maybe soap will have to joing them in ghosts nest since the baby maybe makes a fuss when he leaves?

Oh I Def think soap makes a whole fluffy place for her and then she just crawls into his bed instead 🤣

A silly picture of the kitty? Of the man? The big man? I have a video actually I was gonna share!
